rows.label: qev097703_MSG0001
rows.name:
I've received the data you
were able to salvage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0002
rows.name:
Seems it wasn't just library
data—it looks like an automatic
communication log of some sort.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0003
rows.name:
The time stamp places it just before the White
Whale crashed, and the sender is a different
ark ship sent up from another country.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0004
rows.name:
Needless to say, the Whale's crew had their
hands full at the time, so they were too
busy to trace the other ship's course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0005
rows.name:
Or even to analyze the
message's contents, frankly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0006
rows.name:
But doing that now may bring to light
all kinds of important new info.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0007
rows.name:
Which means finding this data was
a big deal. Great work, tiger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Unless it turns out the data is
actually useless, in which case this
was a waste of everyone's time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0009
rows.name:
BUT! None of that changes the fact
that your job is to grab the core
memory module and bring it home safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0010
rows.name: Don't leave a single byte behind, honey![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0011
rows.name: Nice work out there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'll take that memory
module off your hands...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0013
rows.name: Perfect. Thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0014
rows.name:
Oh, and Commander Vandham was
reeeally interested in that data
sample you sent on ahead...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0015
rows.name:
He's been super impatient for you
to get back with the rest of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0016
rows.name:
Seems he's ready to call this a
historic find even before the
analysis comes back on the contents.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0017
rows.name:
You unearthed a real treasure this
time. Well, according to him, anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0018
rows.name:
Oh, but don't bother asking
for a bonus. Won't happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0019
rows.name:
BLADE contracts are
extremely strict, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0020
rows.name:
But it's for the good of the city, I
suppose— and for us BLADEs by extension.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0021
rows.name:
Makes it harder to complain when
you think of it like that, hmm?
Still possible, mind...but harder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0022
rows.name:
Still, no sense wasting time and social
capital whining about the little things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0023
rows.name:
Not when there's big jobs with
fat rewards waiting to get done![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097703_MSG0024
rows.name:
There's something about risking it all for that
high- stakes payoff that just gets the blood pumping,
you know? Adventure makes me hot and bothered![ST:wait ]
